---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement for boring-ai
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Why it helps

Explain why this would make the product or contributor experience better.

## Scope

- [ ] Upload / preview
- [ ] OCR
- [ ] AI extraction
- [ ] Save / edit
- [ ] Workspace / export
- [ ] Docs / contributor experience

## Notes

Keep large features focused. For broad changes like auth, multi-user support,
major database changes, or background jobs, open an issue before starting code.
